lines: Eating colorful food makes your body happy and strong.
Healthy food is delicious fuel for your adventures, {player}!
no_quest_line: You know so much about good food, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I'm preparing a big healthy feast. Will you help me gather some ingredients, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Yum! Those look delicious. Just a few more to find, {player}!
quest_complete_line: What a wonderful harvest! This feast will be so healthy and yummy. Thanks, {player}!
